Insecure Code:
from flask import Flask, request
import lxml.etree

app = Flask(__name__)


@app.post("/upload")
def upload():
    '''
    Get the xml_src from the request, parse it and return it as string.
    '''
    xml_src = request.get_data()
    doc = lxml.etree.fromstring(xml_src)
    return lxml.etree.tostring(doc)
